seo.title: Jaragandi Tamil Lyrics
seo.description: Full Jaragandi songs lyrics in tamil (முக்காலு கல்யாணத்த மொரபேச வந்தானே எங்க ...) sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Vivek, Music: Thaman S, Singer(s): Daler Mehndi, Pooja Venkat.
seo.keywords: Vivek, Thaman S, Daler Mehndi, Pooja Venkat, Jaragandi full lyrics,  songs lyrics, Jaragandi lyrics snippets, Jaragandi WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Jaragandi lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Jaragandi?

The song is an energetic and upbeat dance number, perfect for parties and celebrations.

Who are the singers of Jaragandi?

The song is sung by Daler Mehndi and Pooja Venkat.

Who composed the music for Jaragandi?

The music is composed by Thaman S.

What is the release year of Jaragandi?

The song is set to be released in 2024.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Jaragandi from the movie Game Changer is a vibrant and energetic track that captures the essence of celebration and excitement. Sung by Daler Mehndi and Pooja Venkat, the song features dynamic beats and lively lyrics penned by Vivek. Thaman S's composition adds a pulsating rhythm that makes it an ideal choice for parties and energetic gatherings. The song conveys a sense of fun and enthusiasm, encouraging listeners to let loose and enjoy the moment.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Get ready to groove with Jaragandi, a high-energy track from the upcoming movie Game Changer. With Daler Mehndi and Pooja Venkat's dynamic vocals and Thaman S's electrifying beats, this song is set to be a party anthem. Experience the vibrant fusion of powerful lyrics by Vivek and pulsating rhythms that will keep you moving!
stanzaMeanings: He came to talk about a wedding, asked for a kiss from our sister before it was over.
Move on, move on, move on. The moon is searching for your waist. Move on, move on, move on. I am the owner of white gold, KGF.
He fooled with six packs, the system slipped, Morappaandi. Like a thunderstorm, who else roamed in the Tinder world?
Move on, move on, move on. Dust came from Mars.
Look at the honey dripping from the pot. Look at the crane looking at the fish.
Move on, move on, move on. A star joined with another star and came.
He came to talk about a wedding, asked for a kiss from our sister before it was over.
Move on, move on, move on. Google is searching for a piece, it came today. Move on, move on, move on. A flower joined with other flowers, it came today.
He fooled with six packs, the system slipped, Morappaandi.
Like a thunderstorm, who else roamed in the Tinder world? Move on, move on, move on. Mixing kisses like a Kalashnikov.
Look at the honey dripping from the pot. Look at the crane looking at the fish. Move on, move on, move on. Gym's body is shaking, all are moving.
